title: Front Office Manager - Celebi India International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Celebi India International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Celebi India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Celebi India International Enterprises:
Celebi India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India International Enterprises!
